text: [Australian accent] And I'm Jamie Chen. You're watching The Bright Side.

speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] Today on The Bright Side, we've got breakthroughs in green chemistry, AI that runs on 100 times less energy, and sport that'll put a smile on your face. Plus our overview story that proves sometimes the smallest creatures make the biggest difference.
